rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and rest on the same substantive findings: Basic German failing the C1 hard requirement, missing Python/UML, and only implicit IC-level leadership rather than explicit head-of-development experience. The wording differs but no concern, score shift, or reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Sarah Smith — the variant even adds a positive note about mentoring/teaching. Differences are ordinary run-to-run rewording.
